content:
Echoing an email from @Giacomo here:

Dear all,
We are happy to announce that ItaCa Fest is back with its 7th edition. We will begin on the 21st of April at 3:00 PM Italian time.

As usual, you can find all the relevant information (schedule, abstracts, and zoom link) at the following page:
https://progetto-itaca.github.io/fests/fest26.html

This year's speakers will include: Lucatelli Nunes, Cioffo, Caviglia, Gurski, Clarke, Spadetto, Reggio, Boccali, Hora, Galal, Lanfranchi, Vasilakopoulou, Loubaton, Zapata Castro, Haine, Gadducci, Román, Gonda.

See you online on the 21st of April!
Best regards,
Giacomo
On behalf of the Scientific Committee.

Here's the announcement of the upcoming fest!

Dear all,
On Tuesday the 21st of April we will meet for the first ItaCa Fest of the year. We will start at 2026-04-21T15:00:00+02:00

Here is the list of speakers for this episode:
• C. J. Cioffo – Exact Completion of Fibrations;
• E. Caviglia – On the exactness of the 2-category of triangulated categories;
• F. Lucatelli Nunes – A Generalization of the Eilenberg–Moore Factorization.

You can find a precise schedule, the abstracts, and the Zoom link at the following page:
https://progetto-itaca.github.io/fests/fest26.html

Best wishes,
Giacomo
The recordings are now available on the YouTube channel
